title: elaphoglossum undulatum
intro: Elaphoglossum undulatum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wavy elaphoglossum or the wavy lacy fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum undulatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Elaphoglossum undulatum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and some herbalists also use it in tinctures and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
